label: FAIL
rationale: StartSession defines SessionTimeout as a uinteger timeout value; accepting boolean true with SUCCESS is not protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartSession defines SessionTimeout as a scalar uinteger timeout value; a list containing text is not a valid supplied uinteger, so SUCCESS is non-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartSession defines TransTimeout as a uinteger acknowledgement timeout; accepting boolean true with SUCCESS is not protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartSession defines TransTimeout as a scalar uinteger timeout value; a list containing text is not a valid supplied uinteger, so SUCCESS is non-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartSession defines InitialCredit as a uinteger amount of credits; negative -1 is outside the uinteger type, so SUCCESS is non-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartSession defines InitialCredit as a uinteger credit amount; accepting boolean true with SUCCESS is not protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartSession defines InitialCredit as a uinteger credit amount; nonnumeric text is not a valid uinteger, so SUCCESS is non-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: StartSession defines InitialCredit as a scalar uinteger credit amount; a list containing text is not a valid supplied uinteger, so SUCCESS is non-compliant.
